metadata.name: Goalzone Icelandic highlights candidate dataset
metadata.notes: This file contains candidate Icelandic football highlight links for Goalzone demo and early production review. Data should be verified before production use. Unknown values are null rather than guessed.

highlights.title: Vestri 3-1 Stjarnan - magnað endurkomumyndband
highlights.description: Vestri vann sterkan endurkomusigur gegn Stjörnunni.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube embed found through a Fotbolti.net goals article.

highlights.title: KA 1-0 Afturelding - stórkostlegt sigurmark
highlights.description: Hallgrímur Már skoraði sigurmark KA gegn Aftureldingu.
highlights.notes: Title names the scorer and frames the clip as a strong demo for late-game drama.

highlights.title: Valur 3-0 ÍBV - sannfærandi sigur Vals
highlights.description: Valur vann öruggan sigur gegn ÍBV.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube match highlight.

highlights.title: KR 2-3 Fram - sterkur sigur í Reykjavíkurslag
highlights.description: Framarar unnu sterkan sigur gegn KR.
highlights.notes: Good rivalry/local-demo candidate.

highlights.title: KR 0-7 Víkingur - stórsigur í Vesturbæ
highlights.description: Víkingur vann sögulegan stórsigur gegn KR.
highlights.notes: Strong demo candidate because the scoreline is immediately attention-grabbing.

highlights.title: FH 2-2 Fram - innkoma tryggði efri hlutann
highlights.description: FH og Fram skildu jöfn eftir dramatískan leik.
highlights.notes: Title mentions Bjarni Guðjóns and a decisive impact from the bench.

highlights.title: KA 4-1 Vestri - Akureyringar buðu til sýningar
highlights.description: KA vann sannfærandi sigur gegn Vestra.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube match highlight.

highlights.title: Valur 1-2 Stjarnan - fimmti sigurinn í röð
highlights.description: Stjarnan vann mikilvægan sigur gegn Val.
highlights.notes: Good candidate for team/club filtering.

highlights.title: ÍA 3-0 Breiðablik - mikilvægur sigur Skagamanna
highlights.description: ÍA vann sterkan sigur gegn Breiðabliki.
highlights.notes: Strong club-based candidate because both teams are recognizable locally.

highlights.title: Afturelding 1-0 Víkingur - sögulegur sigur
highlights.description: Afturelding vann sögulegan sigur gegn Víkingi.
highlights.notes: Useful for showing smaller/community clubs against bigger names.

highlights.title: ÍBV 3-1 Fram - sterkur sigur í Eyjum
highlights.description: ÍBV vann sterkan sigur gegn Fram.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube match highlight.

highlights.title: KR 1-2 Stjarnan - Örvar skoraði tvö
highlights.description: Örvar skoraði tvö mörk í sigri Stjörnunnar.
highlights.notes: Scorer is named in the YouTube title.

highlights.title: Víkingur 3-1 FH - Víkingar fóru á toppinn
highlights.description: Víkingur vann FH og fór á toppinn.
highlights.notes: Useful for table/race narrative in a demo.

highlights.title: KA 0-1 Breiðablik - meistararnir unnu bikarmeistarana
highlights.description: Breiðablik vann nauman sigur gegn KA.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube match highlight.

highlights.title: Valur 6-1 KR - markaveisla að Hlíðarenda
highlights.description: Valur vann stórsigur gegn KR í Reykjavíkurslag.
highlights.notes: Very strong demo clip because the scoreline and rivalry sell the platform quickly.

highlights.title: Breiðablik 1-1 Fram - hart barist í Kópavogi
highlights.description: Breiðablik og Fram skildu jöfn.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube match highlight.

highlights.title: ÍBV 1-2 Afturelding - Aron Jóhannsson tók málin í sínar hendur
highlights.description: Aron Jóhannsson steig upp í sigri Aftureldingar.
highlights.notes: Player named in title; useful for playerName filtering.

highlights.title: Fram 4-2 Breiðablik - frábær endurkoma
highlights.description: Fram vann Breiðablik eftir sterka endurkomu.
highlights.notes: Strong story-driven candidate.

highlights.title: Vestri 1-0 FH - sterkur fyrsti heimaleikur
highlights.description: Vestri vann sterkan heimasigur gegn FH.
highlights.notes: Good local/community story.

highlights.title: Víkingur 4-0 KA - sannfærandi sigur
highlights.description: Víkingur vann öruggan sigur gegn KA.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube match highlight.

highlights.title: Afturelding 4-3 KR - markaveisla í Mosfellsbæ
highlights.description: Afturelding og KR buðu upp á sjö marka leik.
highlights.notes: Excellent demo candidate because it clearly communicates entertainment value.

highlights.title: Fram 1-0 Vestri - sterkur sigur Framara
highlights.description: Fram vann nauman sigur gegn Vestra.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube match highlight.

highlights.title: KR 3-2 FH - Eiður Gauti með tvö mörk
highlights.description: Eiður Gauti skoraði tvö í endurkomusigri KR.
highlights.notes: Strong demo candidate because it includes named player, rivalry and comeback.

highlights.title: Víkingur 2-1 Afturelding - Nikolaj Hansen steig upp
highlights.description: Nikolaj Hansen átti stóran þátt í sigri Víkings.
highlights.notes: Player named in title; useful for demonstrating player metadata.

highlights.title: Fram 2-0 ÍBV - sigur Framara gegn Eyjamönnum
highlights.description: Fram vann ÍBV með tveimur mörkum.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube match highlight.

highlights.title: Vestri 0-2 ÍA - mikilvægur sigur Skagamanna
highlights.description: ÍA sótti sterkan sigur gegn Vestra.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube match highlight.

highlights.title: Aron Sigurðarson með þrumu fyrir KR gegn Val
highlights.description: Aron Sigurðarson skoraði með skoti af löngu færi.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube short; previously useful as a demo-style clip.

highlights.title: Blikar breyta vörn í sókn
highlights.description: Breiðablik breytir varnaraðgerð í hraða sókn.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube short; good for showing non-goal highlight classification.

highlights.title: Helgi Fróði með þræðingu inn fyrir vörnina
highlights.description: Helgi Fróði opnaði vörnina með góðri sendingu.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube short; useful for assist/skill-adjacent demo filtering.

highlights.title: FH 3-4 Fram - Framarar komu fjórum sinnum til baka
highlights.description: Fram vann ótrúlegan lokaleik gegn FH.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube highlight; strong story candidate.

highlights.title: KA 2-1 Stjarnan - sigur stolið í lokin
highlights.description: KA vann Stjörnuna með marki í lok leiks.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube highlight; good for last-minute winners category.

highlights.title: Hólmar Örn bjargar á ótrúlegan hátt gegn KA
highlights.description: Hólmar Örn náði að koma í veg fyrir mark með frábærri björgun.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube short; important because Goalzone should not only show goals.

highlights.title: Gyða Kristín með frábært langskot
highlights.description: Gyða Kristín minnkaði muninn með góðu skoti af löngu færi.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube short; strong women's football demo clip.

highlights.title: Elísa Bríet Björnsdóttir með sitt fyrsta mark í Bestu deildinni
highlights.description: Elísa Bríet skoraði sitt fyrsta mark í Bestu deildinni.
highlights.notes: Official Besta deildin YouTube short; great community/local story.

highlights.title: HK - Þróttur R.
highlights.description: Lengjudeildar-myndband úr leik HK og Þróttar R.
highlights.notes: Official Lengjudeildin YouTube channel according to oEmbed author data.

highlights.title: Keflavík - Njarðvík
highlights.description: Lengjudeildar-myndband úr leik Keflavíkur og Njarðvíkur.
highlights.notes: Official Lengjudeildin YouTube channel according to oEmbed author data.
